name: Creamy Coffee Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Melt butter and chocolate chips in the top of a double boiler.
3. Stir in graham cracker crumbs. Spoon into a lightly greased 9-inch pie plate.
4. Bake for 8 minutes. Cool completely on a wire rack.
5. Mix together sugar and cornstarch in a heavy saucepan and set aside.
6. Mix coffee and boiling water together. Stir until the coffee dissolves.
7. Stir coffee, milk, and yolks into the sugar mixture.
8. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens and boils.
9. Cook for 1 minute. Remove from heat. Whisk until smooth.
10. Place a piece of plastic wrap directly on the surface and chill for 1 hour.
11. Beat whipping cream on low speed until foamy. Slowly add powdered sugar. Beat until soft peaks form. Set aside.
12. Fold whipped cream into coffee mixture.
13. Spoon filling into pie shell. Garnish with reserved whipped cream and coffee beans.
